[2018-06-05 01:53] awaclus: >well, I guess it's a pixie that also gives you defense value
yeah, which is not too bad
[2018-06-05 01:54] cogito3 (Cogito): what I said earlier is wrong, I do think the main issue is you don't have the leeway to spend 2 gold a turn on each vore in vore sets, usually
[2018-06-05 01:54] amalloy: you don't buy engis to power vores, you buy engis to have granular defense. vore's presence makes it much more valuable to do something that's pretty okay anyway
[2018-06-05 01:55] supergreyman (Greyman): Think about this: if you can have your electrovore attack twice, it's already a more efficient Rhino.
[2018-06-05 01:55] cogito3 (Cogito): well, it's not prompt, but yeah
